name: Spring Classics
description: A 90-minute tour through the Spring Classics monuments: Omloop Het Nieuwsblad, Strade Bianche, E3 Saxo Classic, Milan-San Remo, Tour of Flanders, Paris-Roubaix, Liège-Bastogne-Liège, and Il Lombardia. Progressive intensity with race-specific efforts.

intervals.name: Omloop Het Nieuwsblad
intervals.notes: The opening gun of the Belgian spring. Spin sharp, hold your position.

intervals.name: Omloop Het Nieuwsblad
intervals.notes: Up the Wijnpers and Molenberg. Hold steady on the climbs.

intervals.name: Omloop Het Nieuwsblad
intervals.notes: Punch over the top. Don't ease up.

intervals.name: Strade Bianche
intervals.notes: Gravel sectors demand steady power — don't spike, find your rhythm.

intervals.name: Strade Bianche
intervals.notes: Into the gravel. White roads, white dust — hold your line.

intervals.name: Strade Bianche
intervals.notes: Brief reprieve on asphalt. Reset and breathe.

intervals.name: E3 Saxo Classic
intervals.notes: Punch up the Flemish bergs. Big gear, high cadence — recover fast, do it again.

intervals.name: E3 Saxo Classic
intervals.notes: Spin out the legs. Keep the cadence high, recover fast.

intervals.name: Milan-San Remo
intervals.notes: La Classicissima — 295 km to the Poggio. Patience. The race starts in the final 10 minutes.

intervals.name: Milan-San Remo
intervals.notes: Over the Cipressa. The climb that strings the bunch.

intervals.name: Milan-San Remo
intervals.notes: Brief descent before the Poggio. Save something.

intervals.name: Milan-San Remo
intervals.notes: The Poggio. 3.7 km. This is where it's won.

intervals.name: Tour of Flanders
intervals.notes: Over the Paterberg. Attack the top. Every rep is a new berg.

intervals.name: Paris-Roubaix
intervals.notes: You're on the pavé. Brace, drive, survive. The forest of Arenberg doesn't give back.

intervals.name: Paris-Roubaix
intervals.notes: The cobbles bite back. Drive through.

sequence.name: Liège-Bastogne-Liège
sequence.notes: La Doyenne since 1892. The Ardennes don't flatten. Dig.

sequence.name: Liège-Bastogne-Liège
sequence.notes: La Redoute. Steep and long. Find your rhythm and hold.

sequence.name: Liège-Bastogne-Liège
sequence.notes: La Doyenne demands more. Up the Côte de Saint-Nicolas.

sequence.name: Liège-Bastogne-Liège
sequence.notes: Steeper now. The legs are tired. Push.

sequence.name: Liège-Bastogne-Liège
sequence.notes: The gradient bites. This is what you trained for.

sequence.name: Liège-Bastogne-Liège
sequence.notes: Last summit of La Doyenne. Leave nothing behind.

sequence.name: Il Lombardia
sequence.notes: Race of the Falling Leaves. This is your last climb of the season. Leave nothing.

sequence.name: Il Lombardia
sequence.notes: The gradient tilts. Here comes the Via Civesio.

sequence.name: Il Lombardia
sequence.notes: Full gas. Sprint for the monument.

sequence.name: Victory Lap
sequence.notes: The Roubaix velodrome. Raise your arms. This is what the cobbles were for.
